mapper.sql: f.id, f.frame_no, f.community_id, f.building, f.unit, f.elevator, f.inner_position
mapper.select: SELECT , c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM frame f LEFT JOIN community c ON f.community_id = c.id WHERE f.id = #{id}
SELECT , c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM frame f LEFT JOIN community c ON f.community_id = c.id WHERE f.frame_no = #{frameNo}
SELECT , c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM frame f LEFT JOIN community c ON f.community_id = c.id ORDER BY f.id DESC
SELECT , c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM frame f LEFT JOIN community c ON f.community_id = c.id WHERE f.community_id = #{communityId} ORDER BY f.id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO frame ( frame_no, community_id, building, unit, elevator, inner_position ) VALUES
(#{item.frameNo}, #{item.communityId}, #{item.building}, #{item.unit}, #{item.elevator}, #{item.innerPosition})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM frame WHERE id IN
#{id}
